source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析7》

segments.text: Welcome to our holiday special.
segments.translation: 欢迎收听我们的假日特别节目。

segments.text: Today, I'll be talking about a new cycle route in this area called the Elmsden Way.
segments.translation: 今天我要介绍这一地区一条名为埃尔姆斯登之路的新自行车路线。

segments.text: It's well sign-posted, so you can see exactly where to go, and it's an easy ride with no steep hills.
segments.translation: 沿途路标清晰，你能确切知道该往哪里走，而且全程骑行轻松，没有陡坡。

segments.text: It's 35 kilometers long from Elmsden to Langton and consists partly of cycle paths and partly of roads.
segments.translation: 这条路线从埃尔姆斯登到兰顿，全长35公里，一部分是自行车道，一部分是公路。

segments.text: Let me outline the route briefly, starting at Elmsden railway station.
segments.translation: 让我从埃尔姆斯登火车站开始，简要介绍一下这条路线。

segments.text: The first part is a cycle path running eastwards roughly parallel to the rail track.
segments.translation: 第一段是一条向东延伸、与铁路线大致平行的自行车道。

segments.text: Almost immediately, the railway curves away and goes around the southern side of a little lake, but the cycle path takes the northern route around the lake.
segments.translation: 铁路很快便转弯绕到一个小湖的南侧，而自行车道则沿湖的北侧绕行。

segments.text: Keep your eyes open for the swans that nest there.
segments.translation: 留意在那里筑巢的天鹅。

segments.text: The path then joins the road and the next landmark is a group of massive rocks that tower over the countryside.
segments.translation: 随后自行车道汇入公路，下一个地标是一组高耸于乡间的巨岩。

segments.text: You'll see them to the east of the road just before the road goes under the railway.
segments.translation: 就在公路从铁路下方穿过之前，你会在公路东侧看到它们。

segments.text: They're imposing.
segments.translation: 它们十分壮观。

segments.text: Soon you'll come to a fork in the road where you'll leave the road and head off towards the river.
segments.translation: 不久你会来到一个岔路口，在那里离开公路，朝河流方向前进。

segments.text: But if you want to make a detour to Corley nature reserve, go straight on instead of leaving the road here.
segments.translation: 不过，如果你想绕道去科利自然保护区，就不要在这里离开公路，而要继续直行。

segments.text: Continuing along the cycle path, you'll reach the river Cleve.
segments.translation: 沿着自行车道继续前行，你会到达克利夫河。

segments.text: The cycle path follows the river southwards.
segments.translation: 自行车道沿河向南延伸。

segments.text: After a bit, you'll see the Ashington china factory, which closed in 1962.
segments.translation: 过一会儿，你会看到1962年关闭的阿辛顿瓷器厂。

segments.text: It now offers guided tours to the public which is worth a visit.
segments.translation: 现在那里向公众提供导览参观，值得一去。

segments.text: Right after the factory, there's a bridge over the river and you carry on with farmland to the north right after the bridge and the Langton forest to the south.
segments.translation: 工厂后面紧接着有一座跨河桥；过桥后继续前行，北面是农田，南面是兰顿森林。

segments.text: Somewhere between the cycle route and the railway line sited a statue of Captain Cook, which dates back to the 18th century.
segments.translation: 在自行车路线与铁路线之间的某处，坐落着一座可追溯至18世纪的库克船长雕像。

segments.text: The route ends at Langton village, where you'll find a railway station.
segments.translation: 路线终点是兰顿村，那里有一座火车站。

segments.text: So, you can either catch the train here or cycle back to Elmsden.
segments.translation: 因此，你可以在这里乘火车，也可以骑车返回埃尔姆斯登。

segments.text: One point to remember when cycling on the Elmsden Way is to keep your eyes open for sheep, which occasionally stray onto the cycle path from the adjoining fields.
segments.translation: 骑行埃尔姆斯登之路时要记住一点：留意绵羊，它们偶尔会从相邻的田地跑到自行车道上。

segments.text: So be careful to avoid accidents.
segments.translation: 所以一定要小心，避免发生事故。

segments.text: The park is well-constructed, so wet or muddy conditions do not affect it.
segments.translation: 这条道路修建得很好，因此潮湿或泥泞的环境不会对它造成影响。

segments.text: There'll be old cars or tractors when you're cycling on roads, but most traffic has been diverted to the main road that bypasses the whole area.
segments.translation: 在公路上骑行时会遇到老式汽车或拖拉机，不过大部分车辆都已被分流到绕过整个地区的主干道上。

segments.text: Now a bit more about some of the places you'll see.
segments.translation: 现在再多介绍一些沿途会看到的地方。

segments.text: The starting point, Elmsden Station, was quite busy in the early 20th century with services to several major cities, but it was closed in the 1950s.
segments.translation: 起点埃尔姆斯登车站在20世纪初十分繁忙，有开往数座主要城市的列车，但它在20世纪50年代关闭了。

segments.text: Eventually, a small company was set up to turn it into a sort of railway museum, maintaining it in the style of the 1950s, and the station was ready for trains to start using it again earlier this year.
segments.translation: 后来，一家小公司成立，将它改造成类似铁路博物馆的场所，保持20世纪50年代的风格；今年早些时候，车站已经修缮完毕，可以重新通车。

segments.text: It's only used by a few local trains, though.
segments.translation: 不过，只有少数本地列车使用这座车站。

segments.text: There's a Visitors' Centre at the station, which houses a small exhibition about the history of railway transport all over the world, and a facility for hiring bikes if you don't have one of your own.
segments.translation: 车站内设有游客中心，里面有一个介绍世界铁路运输史的小型展览；如果你没有自己的自行车，那里还可以租车。

segments.text: A small shop just across the road from the station also sells refreshments.
segments.translation: 车站马路对面还有一家小商店出售茶点。

segments.text: As I said, you can cycle to Langton and return to Elmsden by train or the other way because you can take your cycle on the train.
segments.translation: 正如我所说，你可以骑车去兰顿，再乘火车返回埃尔姆斯登，也可以反过来走，因为自行车可以带上火车。

segments.text: There's no need to make a reservation; there's plenty of room and no extra charge.
segments.translation: 无需预订，车上空间充足，也不收取额外费用。

segments.text: However, the service is limited, and the trains between these places don't run on weekdays.
segments.translation: 不过，班次有限，而且这些地点之间的列车在工作日不运行。

segments.text: If you want to see the River Elm, there's a footpath from Elmsden station.
segments.translation: 如果你想去看看埃尔姆河，可以从埃尔姆斯登车站沿一条步道前往。

segments.text: And you can safely leave your bike in the car park there.
segments.translation: 你可以放心地把自行车停在那里的停车场。

segments.text: Leave yourself plenty of time, though.
segments.translation: 不过，要给自己留出充足的时间。

segments.text: Going down is easy, but climbing up is pretty steep, so walking back up to the top can take quite a while.
segments.translation: 下坡很容易，但上坡相当陡，因此步行返回坡顶可能需要很长时间。

segments.text: But it's worth the effort.
segments.translation: 不过，这番辛苦是值得的。

segments.text: The scenery is lovely and the footpath runs right next to the river down to a waterfall.
segments.translation: 景色很美，步道紧邻河流，一直通往一处瀑布。

segments.text: Finally, there are many other cycle paths if you like to do more cycling in the area.
segments.translation: 最后，如果你想在这一地区骑更多的路，这里还有许多其他自行车道。

segments.text: We'll be talking on the radio about them, and you'll be able to get fuller details in the Saturday edition of the local paper.
segments.translation: 我们会在广播中介绍它们，你也可以在当地报纸的周六版上看到更详尽的信息。

segments.text: The national cycle network also has some details on its website, although I have to say they don't have any local ones yet.
segments.translation: 国家自行车路线网的网站上也有一些信息，不过我得说，目前还没有这里的本地路线信息。

segments.text: But that may change, so get out your bicycle ...
segments.translation: 但这种情况可能会改变，所以骑上你的自行车吧……
